case_for: Abdullah has flashed weekly upside with a 14.1-point outing and a 10.7-point performance in his last game, showing he can hit or approach the threshold when volume/usage aligns favorably.
case_against: His volatile role produced four sub-6-point games in his last six outings, and the pregame projection of 10.7 sits below the 12.0 threshold, suggesting his floor as a committee/depth back makes hitting this mark unlikely on a consistent basis.
